mapper.sql: id,drone_model,last_longitude, last_latitude,last_altitude,takeoff_time, landing_time,intrusion_start_time,drone_id, drone_sn,drone_type,frequency, bandwidth,speed,horizontal_heading_angle, vertical_heading_angle,type,scanIDs, scanID,lasting_time,back_longitude, back_latitude,pilot_longitude,pilot_latitude, trajectory,station_id,detect_type,is_disposed
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(intrusion_start_time) AS day, COUNT(DISTINCT drone_sn) AS count FROM alarm WHERE intrusion_start_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(intrusion_start_time)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm (id, drone_model, last_longitude, last_latitude, last_altitude, takeoff_time, landing_time, intrusion_start_time, drone_id, drone_sn, drone_type, frequency, bandwidth, speed, horizontal_heading_angle, vertical_heading_angle, `type`, scanIDs, scanID, lasting_time, back_longitude, back_latitude, pilot_longitude, pilot_latitude, trajectory, station_id, detect_type, is_disposed) VALUES (#{id}, #{droneModel}, #{lastLongitude}, #{lastLatitude}, #{lastAltitude}, #{takeoffTime}, #{landingTime}, #{intrusionStartTime}, #{droneId}, #{droneSn}, #{droneType}, #{frequency}, #{bandwidth}, #{speed}, #{horizontalHeadingAngle}, #{verticalHeadingAngle}, #{type}, #{scanids, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{scanid}, #{lastingTime}, #{backLongitude}, #{backLatitude}, #{pilotLongitude}, #{pilotLatitude}, #{trajectory, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{stationId}, #{detectType}, #{isDisposed}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE drone_model = VALUES(drone_model), last_longitude = VALUES(last_longitude), last_latitude = VALUES(last_latitude), last_altitude = VALUES(last_altitude), takeoff_time = VALUES(takeoff_time), landing_time = VALUES(landing_time), intrusion_start_time = VALUES(intrusion_start_time), drone_id = VALUES(drone_id), drone_sn = VALUES(drone_sn), drone_type = VALUES(drone_type), frequency = VALUES(frequency), bandwidth = VALUES(bandwidth), speed = VALUES(speed), horizontal_heading_angle = VALUES(horizontal_heading_angle), vertical_heading_angle = VALUES(vertical_heading_angle), `type` = VALUES(`type`), scanIDs = VALUES(scanIDs), scanID = VALUES(scanID), lasting_time = VALUES(lasting_time), back_longitude = VALUES(back_longitude), back_latitude = VALUES(back_latitude), pilot_longitude = VALUES(pilot_longitude), pilot_latitude = VALUES(pilot_latitude), trajectory = VALUES(trajectory), station_id = VALUES(station_id), detect_type = VALUES(detect_type), is_disposed = VALUES(is_disposed)
